reference: I have experienced sleepiness for over a year since October two thousand and ten, along with dizziness and vision problems that occur before a dizzy episode. My blood pressure is low, and I have seen a cardiologist due to this issue. I had a severe dizzy spell while talking to someone, followed by recovering, and then my whole body started shaking for a minute while standing. Since then, I have had headaches, feel off balance visually, and have difficulty walking.
text: I have experienced sleepiness for over a year since October 2010, along with dizziness and vision problems that occur before a dizzy episode. My blood pressure is low, and I have seen a cardiologist due to this issue. I had a severe dizzy spell while talking to someone, followed by recovering, and then my whole body started shaking for a minute while standing. Since then, I have had headaches, feel off balance visually, and have difficulty walking.
